PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/maps" -UseBasicParsing; $d = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $maps = $d.maps; Write-Host "$\($maps.Count\) maps"; $maps[0..4] | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.map\): played=$\($_.played\) picks=$\($_.picks\) bans=$\($_.bans\) agents=$\($_.agents.Count\) comps=$\($_.comps.Count\)" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/player/profile?name=aspas" -UseBasicParsing; $d = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Name: $\($d.name\)"; Write-Host "Overall maps: $\($d.overall.picks\), rating: $\($d.overall.rating\)"; Write-Host "Agents: $\($d.agents.Count\), Maps: $\($d.maps.Count\)"; $d.agents | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.agent\): $\($_.picks\) picks, rating=$\($_.rating\)" })
